channel.title: Community on Tenkai
channel.description: Recent content in Community on Tenkai

item.title: Tenkai Daily — March 14, 2026
item.description: Open Source Releases BitNet — Official inference framework for 1-bit LLMs, implementing the core kernels for efficient low-bit computation. It provides a practical path for deploying highly compressed models, significantly reducing memory footprint and computational cost for inference. openrag — A comprehensive RAG platform built on Langflow, Docling, and OpenSearch, packaged as a single deployable solution. It abstracts the complexity of integrating retrieval and generation components, allowing engineers to stand up a production RAG pipeline faster.
